metadata.title: Headpanel Console
metadata.description: A modern management console for headscale control planes

auth.title: Headpanel Console
auth.description: Sign in with your account credentials

pending.title: Pending approvals
pending.description: {count} nodes joined but are not approved yet. Approve to add the group access tag and open ACL access; reject to delete the node. Pending nodes remain isolated by ACL.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Each group maps to one headscale user and one access tag. Groups are isolated from each other.
groups.name: Name

groupForm.title: New group
groupForm.description: Creates a headscale user namespace, generates a group access tag, recalculates ACLs, and issues a group admin account.
groupForm.name: Group name
groupForm.slugPlaceholder: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens, e.g. acme
groupForm.created: Group created and admin account issued

groupActions.deleteDescription: This will delete the group's headscale user, all nodes under it, the group admin account, and then recalculate ACLs. This cannot be undone.

preAuthKeys.title: PreAuthKeys
preAuthKeys.description: {count} keys · Each key can show install commands and can be deleted directly from headscale.

createKey.title: Generate PreAuthKey
createKey.description: Use this for client tailscale up --authkey onboarding. Copy it immediately; lists only show a masked key.
createKey.noGroups: Create a group before generating keys.
createKey.reviewMode: Review required (pending approval before ACL access)
createKey.directMode: Direct (adds group access tag and skips approval)

keyActions.commandsDescription: Run on the target machine. Devices using review mode will appear under Pending after joining.
keyActions.macInstall: macOS one-shot install (official .pkg, no Homebrew required)
keyActions.missingPlaintext: This key has no local plaintext backup. headscale only returns plaintext once when the key is created, so it cannot be recovered later. Generate a new key.
keyActions.deleted: Deleted; the key was removed from the list
keyActions.deleteDescription: This key will be physically deleted from headscale and removed from the list immediately. Nodes that already used it are not affected. This cannot be undone.

pendingActions.rejectDescription: This node will be removed from headscale and its IP will be released. The client must join again and wait for approval. This cannot be undone.

nodeActions.renameDescription: Change the node alias (givenName) in headscale. This does not affect the IP or the client's local hostname.
nodeActions.noteDescription: Add a local management note for this node. It does not affect headscale or the client. Saving an empty value clears the note.
nodeActions.expireDescription: The node will go offline immediately and need to authenticate again. Its database record and IP are kept.
nodeActions.deleteDescription: Remove it from headscale permanently. The IP will be released. This cannot be undone.

network.title: Network
network.description: View and modify the headscale tailaddress pool. IPv4 must be inside 100.64.0.0/10.

networkForm.updated: IPv4 prefix updated and headscale restarted
networkForm.title: Modify headscale IPv4 prefix?
networkForm.description: The address pool will change from {from} to {to}. The config will be backed up and tested with configtest before headscale restarts. Current nodes use {count} IPv4 addresses: {ips}.

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description: Onboarding and uninstall scripts. One-shot onboarding commands are available from each PreAuthKey menu.
scripts.linuxInstall: Linux one-shot install for tailscale + headscale onboarding
scripts.remoteDeploy: macOS/Linux wrapper that scp's the install script to a remote host and runs it
scripts.remoteUninstallDescription: Run on the target machine to cleanly uninstall without arguments. The scripts stop services, uninstall packages, remove leftovers, and verify the result.
scripts.linuxUninstallZerotierCommand: Linux uninstall ZeroTier (leave networks + remove leftovers)

actionErrors.groupAdminPasswordLength: Group admin password must be at least 6 characters
actionErrors.forbiddenGroup: You do not have permission to operate on this group
actionErrors.forbiddenDeleteKey: You do not have permission to delete this key
actionErrors.nodeNamePattern: Name can only contain letters, digits, and hyphens
actionErrors.noteTooLong: Note must be at most 200 characters
